description: Account List Page Type Safety & Filter Enums. (1) serverStats cast to any loses type safety (L-01, AccountsPageClient.tsx:154). (2) Double unsafe cast for withOpportunities stat (L-02, AccountsPageClient.tsx:206-208). (3) AccountTier type and getAccountTier() duplicated locally in AccountCard.tsx instead of using domain enum (L-04). (4) Contact status filter uses hardcoded inline option values instead of ContactStatus domain enum (F-09, AccountContactsList.tsx:81-83). (5) Opportunity stage filter uses hardcoded inline strings instead of OpportunityStage domain enum (F-12, AccountOpportunitiesList.tsx:109-114). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 4-5, 15.

wiring_complete.target: Zero any casts in account pages; filter options from domain enums
wiring_complete.actual: AC-001 grep clean (0 as any/as unknown/as Record< in the 4 files); filters derive from CONTACT_STATUSES/OPPORTUNITY_STAGES

test_coverage.actual: diff-coverage 100% (13/13) on changed lines; domain tier 100% (all 5 branches)

validations.name: TypeScript
validations.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web run typecheck && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/domain run typecheck

notes: Account domain wiring audit finding (L-01,L-02,L-04,F-09,F-12). See docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md. Spec (2026-06-13): L-01/L-02 frontend typing via RouterOutputs (stats already returns withOpportunities, no router change); L-04 move AccountTier/getAccountTier to domain (DRY-enum); F-09/F-12 derive filter options from CONTACT_STATUSES/OPPORTUNITY_STAGES (fixes invalid 'LEAD' + missing NEEDS_ANALYSIS). CSV status kept recognized (In Progress) to satisfy the current-state-report bucket invariant; phases in status_history.
